about.title: About Petit Stay
about.intro1: Petit Stay is a premium babysitter matching platform for families visiting Seoul.
about.intro2: Finding trustworthy childcare while traveling can be stressful — Petit Stay is here to help.
about.intro3: Every sitter completes ID verification, experience checks, and background screening, and speaks multiple languages. From booking to payment to care reports, everything is managed in one simple platform.
about.roleDesc: Petit Stay does not directly employ sitters. We connect verified independent sitters with families. Hotels and accommodations participate as referral partners.
about.promiseDesc: Safe childcare, a relaxing evening. That's the Petit Stay promise.

help.title: Frequently Asked Questions
help.a1: Petit Stay connects traveling families with verified babysitters in Seoul. We specialize in evening in-room childcare at hotels.
help.a2: Every sitter completes ID verification, childcare experience checks, and background screening. Certifications (CPR, first aid, etc.) are displayed on their profiles.
help.a3: Our standard hours are 18:00 to 23:00. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance.
help.q4: Is there an age limit for children?
help.a5: Pay by card when you book. You won't be charged until the sitter confirms. We use secure payment processing.
help.a6: Free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before the session. Late cancellations may incur a fee.
help.q7: Are there services sitters don't provide?
help.a7: Sitters do not provide overnight care, pool/beach supervision, vehicle transportation, or medication administration.
help.a8: Contact us at help@petitstay.com. We'll help you right away.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Petit Stay ("Company") values your personal information and processes it lawfully in accordance with applicable regulations.
privacy.section1: Email address, name, phone number, payment information (card details are securely managed by Stripe), booking history, and child information (name, age, special needs).
privacy.section2: Service delivery and booking management, sitter matching and safety management, payment processing, customer support, and service improvement.
privacy.section3: When a booking is confirmed, child information and contact details are shared with the sitter. Payment is processed through Stripe, and we do not store card numbers directly.
privacy.section4: Personal information is deleted immediately upon account deletion. However, if retention is required by law, the information is kept for the legally mandated period.
privacy.section5: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information. Please contact us at help@petitstay.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Thank you for using Petit Stay. Please read these terms carefully.
terms.section1: Petit Stay is a platform that connects babysitters with families in Seoul. The company does not directly employ sitters; sitters operate as independent service providers.
terms.section2: Bookings are made through the platform and confirmed when the sitter accepts. Payment is collected at booking time but not charged until the sitter confirms.
terms.section3: Free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before the session. Cancellations after that may incur a fee. If the sitter cancels, a full refund is provided.
terms.section4: Sitters do not provide the following services: overnight stays, pool and beach supervision, vehicle transportation, or medication administration. The target age range is 3–8 years.
terms.section5: Petit Stay serves as an intermediary between sitters and families and is not legally liable for direct incidents during care. However, all bookings are covered by liability insurance.
terms.section6: Users must provide accurate information and are responsible for account security. Accounts may be restricted if misuse is detected.
terms.section7: Changes to these terms will be announced within the service. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
